title: Acme Eleventy Blog
summary: Acme Eleventy Blog is a fictional Eleventy fixture used by the PRD-408 conformance gate. This first paragraph is what summary extraction picks up. The rest of the document explains how the Eleventy plugin wires the markdown adapter into the ACT pipeline.

content.text:
Acme Eleventy Blog is a fictional Eleventy fixture used by the PRD-408
conformance gate. This first paragraph is what summary extraction picks
up. The rest of the document explains how the Eleventy plugin wires the
markdown adapter into the ACT pipeline.

## Sections

The site has a small blog and a couple of static landing pages.
